title: ICT Concepts [UAlgo]
author: UAlgo
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: ICT Concepts [UAlgo] by UAlgo.
ICT Concepts is a broad market structure toolkit that combines several core ICT style elements inside a single script.

Instead of focusing on only one concept, the indicator brings together order blocks, market structure shifts, SMT divergence, fair value gaps, balanced price ranges, consequent encroachment, liquidity sweeps, Fibonacci levels, and killzones in one integrated overlay.

The script is designed for traders who want a consolidated structure map rather than a collection of separate … ICT Concepts is a broad market structure toolkit that combines several core ICT style elements inside a single script.
